# JavaScript dependencies

Third-party JavaScript libraries vendored for offline use.

| File | Package | Version | License |
|------|---------|---------|---------|
| `jspdf.umd.min.js` | [jsPDF](https://github.com/parallax/jsPDF) | 2.5.2 | MIT |

Used by the **Create PDF** tab to export a landscape A4 print sheet.
